evals.name: docker-rollback
evals.description: Verifies that incident-playbook-writer handles docker-rollback and produces the expected role-specific artifact.
evals.prompt: 我的项目使用 Docker 部署，帮我生成故障处理和回滚手册。
evals.expected_output: 生成运维手册，包含回滚、故障响应、排查指南

assertions.description: ROLLBACK.md 包含 docker 回滚命令
assertions.text: ROLLBACK.md 包含 docker 回滚命令

assertions.description: INCIDENT_RESPONSE.md 包含常见故障场景
assertions.text: INCIDENT_RESPONSE.md 包含常见故障场景
